en.title: Green direction — soon mandatory, already our north star
en.body: EU CSRD, EU Taxonomy, and energy/water disclosure are moving from voluntary to table stakes. AUROS Green (RTMS, CQS, CSRD check, impact report) + the open RWA comparator are how we show up: measurable climate-linked assets, not greenwashing theater.

fr.title: Direction green — bientôt obligatoire, déjà notre nord
fr.body: CSRD, taxonomie UE et reporting énergie/eau passent du volontariat au standard. AUROS Green (RTMS, CQS, CSRD check, rapport d’impact) + le comparateur RWA ouvert : actifs climat mesurables, pas de théâtre greenwash.

targets.name: DeFiLlama Yields
targets.why: Already powers /compare live APY — credibility as a real data consumer.
targets.notes: Hourly pull of yields.llama.fi/pools. Not a TVL listing of AUROS.

targets.name: DeFiLlama RWA token / platform
targets.why: Primary RWA dashboard visibility for serious allocators.
targets.notes: AUROS is a comparator/platform, not an issuer — use Services / support path + RWA form where applicable. See submission-payload.json.

targets.name: RWA.xyz Directory
targets.why: Default analytics map for tokenized assets — platforms + infrastructure.
targets.notes: Protocol / Infrastructure listing. Company email @getauros.com required for portal.

targets.name: Readi.fi
targets.why: EU-facing RWA DB with sustainable + carbon asset filters — green angle.
targets.notes: Request platform/issuer-tooling profile; highlight Green RTMS + comparator.

targets.name: ClimateTechList
targets.why: High-intent climate talent + founders directory — green direction signal.
targets.notes: Position as climate data / green RWA infrastructure (energy + water), not a token issuer.

targets.name: KnowESG Solutions Directory
targets.why: CSRD / EU Taxonomy buyers search ESG software here — mandatory reporting wave.
targets.notes: Pitch Green CSRD check, impact report, RTMS, CQS — software category sustainable finance.

targets.name: CoinGecko (Others / platform)
targets.why: Retail + research discovery; no native token — Others request only.
targets.notes: Honest: no ERC-20. Platform/comparator reference only.

targets.name: Green Fintech Network (CH)
targets.why: Swiss SIF-backed map — prestige if eligible; CH-org requirement.
targets.notes: Membership for Swiss-based orgs. Watch / partner via EU entity if they open EU track.

targets.name: Solar Impulse Efficient Solutions
targets.why: Labelled solutions map — strong green seriousness if product qualifies.
targets.notes: Long expert review. Only after a crisp Green product dossier (RTMS / Watts / CSRD tool).

targets.name: RapidAPI Hub
targets.why: Developer discovery for MiCA / Green / compare APIs.

outreachEmails.subject: AUROS listing / directory — green RWA & climate data (Readi.fi)
outreachEmails.body:
Hello Readi.fi team,

AUROS (getauros.com) is an EU-facing B2B platform for real-world asset tokenization with a strong green stack:

- AUROS Green — RTMS, carbon quality (CQS), CSRD-oriented checks, impact report
- Open RWA comparator — https://getauros.com/compare (120+ products, live DeFiLlama yields)
- Energy / water resource layer (lab + pilots, HITL settlement)

We are not an asset issuer and do not custody funds. We request a directory / platform listing as infrastructure & analytics for green / sustainable RWA.

Key links
- Site: https://getauros.com
- Green hub: https://getauros.com/green
- Comparator: https://getauros.com/compare
- CSRD check: https://getauros.com/green/csrd-check
- Developers: https://getauros.com/developers
- Logo: https://getauros.com/auros-logo.svg

Contact: adrien.balitrand@gmail.com
Founder: Adrien Balitrand

Happy to provide any verification pack.

Thank you,
Adrien Balitrand
AUROS — https://getauros.com
